title: Durable connector queue and sync state
goal: Add a standalone queue backend and sync state for external connector runs, jobs, object state and dead-letter issues.
acceptance: Queue jobs support attempts, next_attempt_at, locked_until, idempotency_key and dead-letter status.
Queue state is stored outside the primary Django database.
Sync runs record cursor state, counts and error summaries.
Object state supports content hash, external version and tombstone/deletion tracking.
Workers can lease jobs without long transactions around external API calls.
